pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok dependency to version 1.18.46 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode versions.
